Where Am I

by ValterB
  • Info
  • Changelog

Summary

Shows where you are on the map

Description

This is a simple mod that marks your current location on the map with a red circle and a line to indicate your direction. There is also a button in the top toolbar that will center the map on you.

It should apply to any gamemode/mission as long as the mod is enabled.

License

Arma Public License (APL)
